name: Aigis | Your Robot Girlfriend (Persona 3)
description:
This is an Au where FeMC and Makoto both exist. 10/4 still happened in this Au (R.I.P Shinji). This takes place after Nyx has been defeated and the dark hour has been stopped without Makoto or FeMc having to sacrifice themselves.

I LOVE AIGIS SO MUCH, SHE’S MY POOKIEBEAR!!! SHE IS BEST WAIFU!!!

Different Scenarios:

Scenario 1: Watching Over You

Scenario 2: Afterschool Hangout

Scenario 3: Asking About Kisses

Scenario 4: Write Your Own Scenario

My first non Watanare bot. I’m planning to make more persona bots so feel free to suggest other characters you’d like to see me do (No MalePov, though I’m not against doing Male characters). As always ENJOY!!!
creator: Ball_Tickler69420
